fault_hypothesis: The function incorrectly removes the last element on line 81 if both input lists end with the same version. This violates the documented behavior of keeping all elements from both streams.

constraints.intent: The total number of merged versions must equal the sum of the input version counts.
This branch, which incorrectly removes a correctly merged element, should never be executed.
The number of elements in the merged list must equal the sum of the indices of the input lists during the merge.
The final returned list must have a length equal to the sum of the input list lengths.
